text:
Not just numbers — a mathematician who counts where it matters: for people, for Europe.
#Future #Reason #Europe
reply: Indeed! Mathematics goes beyond numbers. It plays a crucial role in decision-making and problem-solving that can greatly impact communities and continents like Europe. #MathematicsInAction #EuropeFuture

text:
A mathematician for president. Rational, pro-European, human. He has my vote.  
#MyCandidate #Europe #Hope
Thought of the day "You cannot swim for new horizons until you have courage to lose sight of the shore" William Faulkner
